description.ko: 고대 암석층의 층을 이룬 질감과 광물맥을 통해 전달되는 지구 역사의 수직적 탐구.
description.en: A vertical exploration of Earth's history told through the layered textures and mineral veins of ancient rock formations.

prompt: Hyper-realistic satellite photography of TERRA-1, titled 'The Sedimentary Chronology.' A top-down macro perspective of a canyon wall where #8B4513 sienna earth and #D2691E ochre sedimentary layers reveal millions of years of geological history. Deep #2F4F4F slate mineral veins cut through the rock like frozen lightning. Sharp #F4A460 sand drifts fill the crevices. Tactile texture showing every grain of mineral and crystalline fracture. Cinematic natural lighting, 8k resolution, hyper-detailed topographical mapping.
